{{旧暦5月}} '''旧暦5月30日'''は、[[5月 (旧暦)|旧暦5月]]の30日目である。5月が[[月の大小#中国暦|大の月]]である年は5月の最終日となる。5月が[[月の大小#中国暦|小の月]]である年では存在しないが、閏月が5月であった場合、閏5月は大の月となるので存在する。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。

{{Lunar May}} {{Lunar May}} '''May 30 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{出典の明記| date = 2025年1月}} {{Lunar May}} ''May 30'''<!--Lunar May30--> is the Nth day of 、[[5月 (旧暦)|Lunar May]]の30日目である。5月が[[月の大小#中国暦|大の月]]である年は5月の最終日となる。5月が[[月の大小#中国暦|小の月]]である年では存在しないが、閏月が5月であった場合、閏5月は大の月となるので存在する。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]][[Category:仏滅]]である。
== Events ==
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[延享]]4年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1747年]][[7月7日]]） - [[太宰春台]]、[[儒学者]]・[[経世論|経世家]]（* [[1680年]]） * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[7月19日]]） - [[沖田総司]]、[[新選組]]隊士（* [[1842年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|29|6|1|4|30|6|5|0530}}

revision.comment: adding info to all the day 30s of the calendar. citation needed see more info
revision.text:
{{Lunar May}} {{Lunar May}} '''May 30 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.{{citation needed}}<!--taken from https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Chinese_calendar&oldid=1278636661 this is present on day 30 of all months, so add it to every single page here when you find a source for one of them-->
<!-- {{出典の明記| date = 2025年1月}} {{Lunar May}} ''May 30'''<!--Lunar May30 is the Nth day of 、[[5月 (旧暦)|Lunar May]]の30日目である。5月が[[月の大小#中国暦|大の月]]である年は5月の最終日となる。5月が[[月の大小#中国暦|小の月]]である年では存在しないが、閏月が5月であった場合、閏5月は大の月となるので存在する。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]][[Category:仏滅]]である。
--> == Events ==
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[延享]]4年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1747年]][[7月7日]]） - [[太宰春台]]、[[儒学者]]・[[経世論|経世家]]（* [[1680年]]） * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[7月19日]]） - [[沖田総司]]、[[新選組]]隊士（* [[1842年]]）

{{Lunar May}} {{Lunar May}} '''May 30 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.{{citation needed}}<!--taken from https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Chinese_calendar&oldid=1278636661 this is present on day 30 of all months, so add it to every single page here when you find a source for one of them-->
<!-- {{出典の明記| date = 2025年1月}} {{Lunar May}} ''May 30'''<!--Lunar May30 is the Nth day of 、[[5月 (旧暦)|Lunar May]]の30日目である。5月が[[月の大小#中国暦|大の月]]である年は5月の最終日となる。5月が[[月の大小#中国暦|小の月]]である年では存在しないが、閏月が5月であった場合、閏5月は大の月となるので存在する。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]][[Category:仏滅]]である。
--> == Events ==
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[延享]]4年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1747年]][[7月7日]]） - [[太宰春台]]、[[儒学者]]・[[経世論|経世家]]（* [[1680年]]） * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[7月19日]]） - [[沖田総司]]、[[新選組]]隊士（* [[1842年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{旧暦360日|5|29|6|1|4|30|6|5|0530}}

revision.comment: Moving from [[Category:仏滅]] to [[Category:Butsumetsu]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

Text replacement - "Old Lunar Calendar360日" to "Lunar Calendar See Also"
Text replacement - " (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the" to "''' is the"
removing all the commented out stuff

Text replacement - "There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.{{citation needed}}" to "There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.{{citation needed|replace this with source on all articles}}"
I think this is the glitch source
attempting again to remove the lunar calendar days comments that are causing problems
removing the annoying spaces that make editing harder
putting this here so I can replace it to insert all necessary interlanguage links into it
doing a mass replace to get the proper intweriki links for all the dates

[[sn:May 30 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 5월 30일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月30日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 30일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月三十]] [[zh:五月三十]] [[en:draft:May 30 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar May}} '''May 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>

== Births ==

As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>

== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[延享]]4th year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1747]][[7月7日]]） - [[太宰春台]]、[[儒学者]]・[[経世論|経世家]]（* [[1680]]） * [[明治]]1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1868]][[7月19日]]） - [[沖田総司]]、[[新選組]]隊士（* [[1842]]）

[[sn:May 30 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 30일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月30日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 30일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月三十]] [[zh:五月三十]] [[en:draft:May 30 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[May 30 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] to [[May 30 (Lunisolar)]]: Text replacement - "Old Lunar Calendar" to "Lunisolar"
revision.text:
[[sn:May 30 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 30일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月30日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 30일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月三十]] [[zh:五月三十]] [[en:draft:May 30 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
== Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|延享}} 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1747]] [[July 7]] ） - [[太宰春台]] 、[[儒学者]] ・[[経世論|経世家]] （* [[1680]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 19]] ） - [[沖田総司]] 、[[新選組]] 隊士（* [[1842]] ）

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:pages to be translated]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages to be translated]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
[[sn:May 30 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 30일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月30日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 30일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月三十]] [[zh:五月三十]] [[en:draft:May 30 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
== Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|延享}} 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1747]] [[July 7]] ） - [[太宰春台]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} ・[[経世論|経世家]] （* [[1680]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 19]] ） - [[沖田総司]] 、[[新選組]] 隊士（* [[1842]] ）
== Commemorations ==

[[sn:May 30 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 30일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月30日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 30일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月三十]] [[zh:五月三十]] [[en:draft:May 30 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>

[[sn:May 30 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 30일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月30日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 30일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月三十]] [[zh:五月三十]] [[en:draft:May 30 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>

== Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō}} 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1747]] [[July 7]] ） - [[太宰春台]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} ・[[経世論|経世家]] （* [[1680]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 19]] ） - [[沖田総司]] 、[[新選組]] 隊士（* [[1842]] ）

revision.text:
[[sn:May 30 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 30일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月30日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 30일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月三十]] [[zh:五月三十]] [[en:draft:May 30 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events ==
== Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō}} 4th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1747]] [[July 7]] ） - [[太宰春台]] 、{{ill|Ru (Confucian scholar)|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生}} ・[[経世論|経世家]] （* [[1680]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 19]] ） - [[沖田総司]] 、[[新選組]] 隊士（* [[1842]] ）
== Commemorations == == See Also ==

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref>Months are also annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>

[[cdo:5 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月三十]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 30''' is the 30th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=draft}}.
As with all other day 30 instances of the Sino-Japanese calendar, this day sometimes occurs and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>

revision.text:
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月三十]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 30''' is the 30th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=draft}}.
As with all other day 30 instances of the Sino-Japanese calendar, this day sometimes occurs and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>

revision.text:
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月三十]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 30''' is the 30th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft|12=draft}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=draft|12=draft}}.
As with all other day 30 instances of the Sino-Japanese calendar, this day sometimes occurs and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events == * <!-- No specific events listed for May 30 -->
== Births == <!-- No births listed for May 30 -->
== Deaths == * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|延享|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1747]] {{ill|July 7|ja|7月7日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Taika (a Confucian scholar)|ja|大内麻呂|12=draft}}, a Confucian scholar and expert in economic theory (died; birth year [[1680]]). * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1868]] {{ill|July 19|ja|7月19日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Okita Sōji|ja|沖田総司|12=draft}}, a member of the Shinsengumi (died; born [[1842]]).
== Commemorations == <!-- Add any commemorations if needed -->
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|29|6|1|4|30|6|5|0530}}
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月三十]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月三十]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月三十]]

revision.text:
{{出典の明記| date = 2025年1月}} {{旧暦5月}} '''旧暦5月30日'''は、[[5月 (旧暦)|旧暦5月]]の30日目である。5月が[[月の大小#中国暦|大の月]]である年は5月の最終日となる。5月が[[月の大小#中国暦|小の月]]である年では存在しないが、閏月が5月であった場合、閏5月は大の月となるので存在する。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと ==
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[延享]]4年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1747年]][[7月7日]]） - [[太宰春台]]、[[儒学者]]・[[経世論|経世家]]（* [[1680年]]） * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[7月19日]]） - [[沖田総司]]、[[新選組]]隊士（* [[1842年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|29|6|1|4|30|6|5|0530}}
[[Category:旧暦5月|日30]]

revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 30''' is the 30th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=|qq=draft}}.
As with all other day 30 instances of the Sino-Japanese calendar, this day sometimes occurs and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>

{{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 30''' is the 30th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=}}.
As with all other day 30 instances of the Sino-Japanese calendar, this day sometimes occurs and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events == *
== Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|延享|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō|qq=}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gregorian calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Gregorian calendar|qq=}} [[1747]] {{ill|July 7|ja|7月7日|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July 7|qq=}}) – {{ill|Taika (a Confucian scholar)|ja|大内麻呂|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taika (a Confucian scholar)|qq=}}, a Confucian scholar and expert in economic theory (died; birth year [[1680]]). * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar|2=ja|3=グレゴリオ暦|4=fr|5=Calendrier grégorien|6=de|7=Gregorianischer Kalender|8=tl|9=Kalendaryong Gregoryano|10=ru|11=Григорианский календарь|ja|グレゴリオ暦|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gregorian calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Gregorian calendar|qq=}} [[1868]] {{ill|July 19|ja|7月19日|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July 19|qq=}}) – {{ill|Okita Sōji|ja|沖田総司|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okita Sōji|qq=}}, a member of the Shinsengumi (died; born [[1842]]).

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|May 30|qq=May 30}}<!--hatnote--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 30''' is the 30th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=}}.
As with all other day 30 instances of the Sino-Japanese calendar, this day sometimes occurs and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 30''' is the 30th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=}}.
As with all other day 30 instances of the Sino-Japanese calendar, this day sometimes occurs and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events == *
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[:en:Enkyō (Edo period)|Enkyō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[1747]] [[:en:July 7|July 7]]) – {{ill|Taika (a Confucian scholar)|ja|大内麻呂|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taika (a Confucian scholar)|qq=}}, a Confucian scholar and expert in economic theory (died; birth year [[1680]]). * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[:en:July 19|July 19]]) – [[:en:Okita Sōji|Okita Sōji]], a member of the Shinsengumi (died; born [[1842]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|29|6|1|4|30|6|5|0530|qq=}}

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|May 30|qq=May 30}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 30''' is the 30th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=}}.
As with all other day 30 instances of the Sino-Japanese calendar, this day sometimes occurs and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events == *
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[:en:Enkyō (Edo period)|Enkyō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:July 7|July 7]]) – {{ill|Taika (a Confucian scholar)|ja|大内麻呂|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taika (a Confucian scholar)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a Confucian scholar and expert in economic theory (died; birth year [[:en:1680|1680]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:July 19|July 19]]) – [[:en:Okita Sōji|Okita Sōji]], a member of the Shinsengumi (died; born [[:en:1842|1842]]).

{{Not to be confused with|May 30|qq=May 30}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 30''' is the 30th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=}}.
As with all other day 30 instances of the Sino-Japanese calendar, this day sometimes occurs and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>

revision.comment: Bot: remove incorrect Shona (sn:) interwiki links
revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839572]] Wikidata name: 30th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 30|qq=May 30}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 30''' is the 30th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
As with all other day 30 instances of the Sino-Japanese calendar, this day sometimes occurs and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events == *
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[:en:Enkyō (Edo period)|Enkyō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:July 7|July 7]]) – {{ill|Taika (a Confucian scholar)|ja|大内麻呂|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taika (a Confucian scholar)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a Confucian scholar and expert in economic theory (died; birth year [[:en:1680|1680]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:July 19|July 19]]) – [[:en:Okita Sōji|Okita Sōji]], a member of the Shinsengumi (died; born [[:en:1842|1842]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|29|6|1|4|30|6|5|0530|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月30日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 30일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月三十]][[zh:五月三十]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839572]] Wikidata name: 30th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 30|qq=May 30}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 30''' is the 30th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
As with all other day 30 instances of the Sino-Japanese calendar, this day sometimes occurs and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月30日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 30일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月三十]][[zh:五月三十]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839572]] Wikidata name: 30th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 30|qq=May 30}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 30''' is the 30th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
As with all other day 30 instances of the Sino-Japanese calendar, this day sometimes occurs and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>

There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>

There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 30''' is the 30th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
As with all other day 30 instances of the Sino-Japanese calendar, this day sometimes occurs and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>

== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[:en:Enkyō (Edo period)|Enkyō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:July 7|July 7]]) – {{ill|Taika (a Confucian scholar)|ja|大内麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taika (a Confucian scholar)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a Confucian scholar and expert in economic theory (died; birth year [[:en:1680|1680]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:July 19|July 19]]) – [[:en:Okita Sōji|Okita Sōji]], a member of the Shinsengumi (died; born [[:en:1842|1842]]).

As with all other day 30 instances of the Sino-Japanese calendar, this day sometimes occurs and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月30日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 30일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月三十]][[zh:五月三十]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月30日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 30일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月三十]][[zh:五月三十]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月30日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 30일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月三十]][[zh:五月三十]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839572]] Wikidata name: 30th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 30|qq=May 30}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 30''' is the 30th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
As with all other day 30 instances of the Sino-Japanese calendar, this day sometimes occurs and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>

{{Not to be confused with|May 30|qq=May 30}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 30''' is the 30th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
As with all other day 30 instances of the Sino-Japanese calendar, this day sometimes occurs and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events == *
== Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Enkyō (Edo period)|en|Enkyō (Edo period)|WD=Q1183728|lt=Enkyō}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1747|en|1747|WD=Q7596|lt=1747}} {{ill|July 7|en|July 7|WD=Q2694|lt=July 7}}) – {{ill|Taika (a Confucian scholar)|ja|大内麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taika (a Confucian scholar)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a Confucian scholar and expert in economic theory (died; birth year {{ill|1680|en|1680|WD=Q7642|lt=1680}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868}} {{ill|July 19|en|July 19|WD=Q2726|lt=July 19}}) – {{ill|Okita Sōji|en|Okita Sōji|WD=Q267549|lt=Okita Sōji}}, a member of the Shinsengumi (died; born {{ill|1842|en|1842|WD=Q7625|lt=1842}}).

{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 30''' is the 30th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10886789}}.
As with all other day 30 instances of the Sino-Japanese calendar, this day sometimes occurs and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
